title: Ion8 Small Water Bottle, Leak Proof, Easy to Open, Secure Lock, Dishwasher Safe, Flip Cover, Carry Handle, Easy Clean, Durable, Water Bottle, Raised Print, Green, Pandas
features: AWARD-WINNING WATER BOTTLES – ION8 bottles have won 3 design awards and are built for active lifestyles. With triple lock seals and fun designs, they’re leakproof, stylish, and easy to keep clean in the dishwasher.
DISHWASHER-SAFE STAINLESS STEEL – Made from food-safe, odour-resistant stainless steel, these bottles are durable, easy to clean, and compatible with a small straw accessory for added ease.
LIGHTWEIGHT & SLIMLINE – Tough yet light stainless steel makes these bottles durable and perfect for daily use. Slim enough to fit in backpacks or car holders. Note: not for hot or cold insulation.
EVEN EASIER REFILL – The flip lid opens fully, staying out of the way while you drink. A wide mouth makes it easy to refill, clean or add ice—perfect for summer heat or busy days out.
LEAKPROOF DESIGN – With a triple lock seal, press-close lid and secure brace, this bottle won’t leak in your bag. Say goodbye to spills and soggy backpacks—stay dry and confident.
description: From the manufacturer Previous page Next page 1 Lightweight Steel 2 Full Flip Lid 3 Easy Carry 4 Easy Clean 5 Award Winning What kind of steel do you use? Will this bottle keep my drinks cold? We only use 304 grades (also known as 18/8): This is highest grade for food use. It is formulated to make it highly resistant to corrosion and easy to sanitize. This bottle will NOT retain temperature and should not be used for very hot drinks. Can you give me tips on using my ION8 OneTouch bottle? When drinking, you only need to tilt a little, as the spout is positioned to flow perfectly with a minimal tilt. Even a leak-proof bottle can leak if seals are lost or removed. Always check all seals are in place. Spares are readily available. How much water do I need to be well hydrated? The EU recommends 2 to 2.5 liters of fluids daily for adults, including water from food. Aim for 6-8 glasses of water or other beverages. Individual needs vary based on factors like size, age, activity level, climate, and health status. How do I clean my ION8? Before use always rinse the water bottle and cap with cool water. After use always rinse in warm water and dish soap only. You can use the dishwasher in the top rack or on a cool wash. Air dry thoroughly before storing and always store with cap off. How do I care for my ION8 bottle? Do not use brushes or abrasives to scrub, do not freeze when full, do not boil or microwave, do not use for carbonated drinks, do not use in a dishwasher on a very hot wash. Always ensure your leak-proof seals are in place.
